Bash(venv/bin/python -c "
from generate import generate

REF = 'output/bosses/boss_glutton_v4.png'

STYLE = \(
    'Pixel art game boss character, beautifully crafted game sprite, '
    'front-facing centered pose, vibrant saturated colors, '
    'clean flat cel shading, bold black outlines, '
    'Korean dokkaebi folklore demon, '
    'cute chibi proportions, charming cartoon villain, '
    'inspired by Dead Cells and Hades pixel art quality, '
    'solid pure green background #00FF00, '
    'no ground, no floor, no shadow, no platform, no base, '
    'sharp pixels, no anti-aliasing, no blur, no text, '
    'premium 16-bit pixel art masterpiece'
\)

bosses = [
    \('boss_trickster', 1234, 'lean wiry mischievous prankster dokkaebi, blue-gray skin, sly wide grin, two curved horns backward, large pointed ears, ragged dark vest, asymmetric eyes one larger, holding wooden club behind back, crouching playful pose'\),
    \('boss_flame', 1234, 'large muscular fire dokkaebi engulfed in flames, charcoal-black cracked skin with glowing orange lava fissures, tall pointed horns ablaze, burning orange eyes, smoke from shoulders, aggressive wide stance, clenched fists dripping flame'\),
    \('boss_shadow', 1234, 'shadow dokkaebi made of living darkness, semi-transparent shifting form, ink-black body, glowing purple eyes as two points of light, wispy shadow tendrils, hunched predatory posture, dark purple core glow'\),
    \('boss_yeomra', 1234, 'King Yama massive deity, six arms holding scroll sword skull mirror scales lotus, elaborate royal Korean robes deep gold and crimson, ornate crown, golden glowing eyes, long dark beard, divine golden aura, final boss'\),
]

for boss_id, seed, desc in bosses:
    prompt = f'{STYLE}, {desc}'
    generate\(prompt, boss_id, category='bosses', seed=seed, reference_image=REF\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(venv/bin/python -c "
from generate import generate

CARD_REF = 'output/card-illustrations/m01_gwang.png'
NO_TEXT = 'absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no writing, no symbols, no script, no kanji, no hangul, no numbers on image'
PREFIX = 'Traditional Korean hwatu hanafuda card pixel art, strictly flat cel shading only, no gradients, no smooth shading, no shadows, no highlights, no glow effects, no lighting, bold black outlines, limited color palette max 8 colors per card, solid flat color fills only, classic hwatu card composition, dark navy-black background #0A0A14,'
SUFFIX = f'solid flat dark navy-black background, strictly flat colors only, absolutely no gradients no shading no shadows no glow no lighting effects, sharp crisp pixels, no anti-aliasing, no blur, no card frame, no border, {NO_TEXT}, NES SNES 16-bit retro pixel art style'

cards = [
    \('m03_gwang', 3001, 'MARCH CHERRY CURTAIN GWANG: bright RED ceremonial curtain lower third with gold fringe, cherry blossom tree above in full bloom pale pink flowers, bright circular GWANG light symbol'\),
    \('m08_gwang', 8001, 'AUGUST FULL MOON GWANG: very large bright yellow full moon circle upper half, dark mountain silhouette below, silver pampas grass, bright circular GWANG light symbol'\),
    \('m11_gwang', 11001, 'NOVEMBER PHOENIX GWANG: golden-red phoenix bird on paulownia tree, broad green leaves, wings spread, bright circular GWANG light symbol'\),
    \('m12_gwang', 12001, 'DECEMBER RAIN MAN GWANG: dark figure holding bright red umbrella in heavy rain, willow branches above, rain lines, lightning, bright circular GWANG light symbol'\),
]

for card_id, seed, desc in cards:
    generate\(f'{PREFIX} {desc}, {SUFFIX}', card_id, category='card-illustrations', seed=seed, aspect_ratio='2:3', reference_image=CARD_REF\)
" 2>&1)

from PIL import Image
img = Image.open\('../dokkaebi-love2d/assets/sprites/ui-frames/ui_card_frame_tti.png'\).convert\('RGBA'\)
w, h = img.size
pixels = img.load\(\)
cx, cy = w//2, h//2
print\(f'중앙 픽셀 \({cx},{cy}\):', pixels[cx,cy]\)
print\(f'샘플 픽셀들:'\)
for x in [cx-20,cx,cx+20]:
    for y in [cy-30,cy,cy+30]:
        print\(f'  \({x},{y}\):', pixels[x,y]\)
")

Bash(venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
from PIL import Image
img = Image.open\("../dokkaebi-love2d/assets/sprites/ui-frames/ui_card_frame_tti.png"\).convert\("RGBA"\)
w, h = img.size
pixels = img.load\(\)
cx, cy = w//2, h//2
print\(f"Frame size: {w}x{h}"\)
print\(f"Center pixel: {pixels[cx, cy]}"\)

# Count transparent pixels in center region
transparent = sum\(1 for x in range\(w//4, 3*w//4\) for y in range\(h//4, 3*h//4\) if pixels[x,y][3]==0\)
total = \(w//2\)*\(h//2\)
print\(f"Center region transparent: {transparent}/{total} = {transparent/total*100:.1f}%"\)

# Check corners \(should be transparent too - exterior\)
corners = [pixels[0,0], pixels[w-1,0], pixels[0,h-1], pixels[w-1,h-1]]
print\(f"Corners: {corners}"\)
EOF)

Bash(venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
from PIL import Image
img = Image.open\("../dokkaebi-love2d/assets/sprites/ui-frames/ui_card_frame_tti.png"\).convert\("RGBA"\)
w, h = img.size
pixels = img.load\(\)

# Find the ring bounds by scanning rows/cols for opaque pixels
# Find leftmost opaque column
left = next\(\(x for x in range\(w\) for y in range\(h\) if pixels[x,y][3] > 128\), None\)
right = next\(\(x for x in range\(w-1, -1, -1\) for y in range\(h\) if pixels[x,y][3] > 128\), None\)
top = next\(\(y for y in range\(h\) for x in range\(w\) if pixels[x,y][3] > 128\), None\)
bottom = next\(\(y for y in range\(h-1, -1, -1\) for x in range\(w\) if pixels[x,y][3] > 128\), None\)
print\(f"Opaque ring bounding box: left={left}, top={top}, right={right}, bottom={bottom}"\)
print\(f"Image size: {w}x{h}"\)

# Find the hole \(innermost transparent region after ring\)
# Scan from center outward on middle row to find ring inner edge
mid_y = h // 2
hole_left = cx = w // 2
for x in range\(w//2, -1, -1\):
    if pixels[x, mid_y][3] > 128:
        hole_left = x + 1
        break

hole_right = w // 2
for x in range\(w//2, w\):
    if pixels[x, mid_y][3] > 128:
        hole_right = x - 1
        break

mid_x = w // 2
hole_top = h // 2
for y in range\(h//2, -1, -1\):
    if pixels[mid_x, y][3] > 128:
        hole_top = y + 1
        break

hole_bottom = h // 2
for y in range\(h//2, h\):
    if pixels[mid_x, y][3] > 128:
        hole_bottom = y - 1
        break

print\(f"Hole inner bounds: left={hole_left}, top={hole_top}, right={hole_right}, bottom={hole_bottom}"\)
print\(f"Hole size: {hole_right-hole_left}x{hole_bottom-hole_top}"\)
print\(f"As pct of {w}x{h}: x={hole_left/w*100:.1f}%, y={hole_top/h*100:.1f}%, w={\(\(hole_right-hole_left\)/w*100\):.1f}%, h={\(\(hole_bottom-hole_top\)/h*100\):.1f}%"\)
EOF)
